_meta.description: Collector-derived contract for the Homebrew ecosystem tab.

summary_metrics.label: Tracked image lanes
summary_metrics.derivation: Count all variant-branch lanes from docs/data/variant-publishers.json.

summary_metrics.label: Lanes with Homebrew data
summary_metrics.derivation: Count lanes with Homebrew analytics data from formulae.brew.sh or upstream tap repos present in docs/data/.

summary_metrics.label: Lanes awaiting Homebrew data
summary_metrics.derivation: Count lanes with no Homebrew analytics data from formulae.brew.sh or upstream tap repos in docs/data/.

rows.state_reason: No Homebrew analytics data from formulae.brew.sh or upstream tap repos is tracked in docs/data/ for this lane. Collector will populate install_count/download_count once a repo-owned artifact fetched from those sources is committed.
rows.derivation: Lane derived from docs/data/variant-publishers.json bluefin.branches; no Homebrew analytics data (formulae.brew.sh or upstream tap repos) found in docs/data/.
